channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: PitchBook: US venture funding surges to record $267B as OpenAI, Anthropic and xAI dominate AI deals
item.description: U.S. venture capital activity surged to unprecedented levels in the first quarter of 2026, driven by a small number of outsized artificial intelligence deals that reshaped the overall market profile, according to a first look at the quarterly PitchBook-NVCA V… [Intel, OpenAI, Anthropic]

item.title: Memory will consume 30% of hyperscaler AI data center spending this year, a 4X increase over 2023 — Nvidia gets preferential supply terms well below standard market rates, says analyst firm - Tom's Hardware
item.description: Memory will consume 30% of hyperscaler AI data center spending this year, a 4X increase over 2023 — Nvidia gets preferential supply terms well below standard market rates, says analyst firm Tom's Hardware [Nvidia]

item.title: Fidelity marks down conversational AI platform Gupshup's valuation by 80% to $278 million
item.description: Gupshup was valued at $1.4 billion when Fidelity first invested in the company back in 2021 through a secondary transaction. The asset manager has been steadily revising the value of its holding and had marked it down to $697 million as of July 2023.

item.title: Samsung Elec likely to report stupendous surge in quarterly profit to record level
item.description: SEOUL, April 3 : Samsung Electronics, benefiting from red-hot chip prices stoked by the AI boom, is expected to book a six-fold jump in operating profit for January-March - a quarterly record and just shy of what it earned for all of the past business year.Bo… [Samsung]

item.title: IRGC hits US tech giant Oracle's data center, computing site in UAE over new assassinations
item.description: The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) announced on Thursday that it struck a data center and computing infrastructure belonging to the US tech giant Oracle, based in the United Arab Emirates, in response to the latest assassinations in Iran. [Oracle]

item.title: Why Iran targeted Amazon data centres, what that does – and doesn’t – change about warfare
item.description: The Financial Times reported that an Iranian drone hit an Amazon data center in Bahrain on April 1, and Iranian state media claimed an attack on an Oracle data center in Dubai on April 2 [Amazon, Oracle]

item.title: Google Confirms Texas Gas Plant Partnership for AI Datacenter Amid Revised Climate Strategy
item.description: Introduction Google confirmed plans for a partnership with a natural gas power plant to potentially power a new artificial intelligence datacenter in Texas, according to a report by the research group Cleanview. [1] The proposed 933-megawatt plant in Armstron… [Intel, Alphabet]
